items.quote: My name is James again, and I'm calling on behalf of education experts from the Quality Monitor line.
And, well, I see that you recently filled a form on the Internet expressing an interest in earning a degree, sir.
I'll just need only a few moments of your time so I can match you with the most appropriate schools.
Are you at least 18 years of age?
Do you currently have a high school diploma or a GED?
If may I ask, if you can find a school for you that meets your needs,
would you be interested in furthering your education in the next six months?
So let me first verify the information I already got for you, Mr. Paldrill.
I got your first name, Mr. Marcos.
Now kindly verify for me your address, please.
Now this time kindly verify for me your city, state, and your zip code, please.
Now lastly kindly verify for me your email address, please.
Now may I ask what area of interest you're looking to further education career in
or what course would you like to...
What course would you like to take up in college, sir?
Really right now I'm really undecided.
If I had a few options to look into right now, kind of undecided on that.
But in the future, if there's any course that you would like to take up,
would you like me to match it right now so that you have information in your hand?
Would that be fine with you?
And what degree type are you looking to obtain?
And what degree type are you looking to obtain?
Would it be just simply an associate or a bachelor's degree?
And I'm just simply going to match it with schools here.
Now may I ask how old are you, please?
Are you interested in information system?
Can you tell me what is that very early?
I don't have the full details here.
But certainly it will be involved.
I don't know what time it is.
Every time we come, I don't know what's going on.
I think it is a feature set again.
Well, I don't have the details about information system,
but definitely it will involve computers.
But once I match you with this,
school enrollment counselors will try to contact you,
and they can further explain what this is all about.
Will that be fine with you?
May I ask, are you associated with the United States military?
Is your GED your highest level of education,
or are we able to pick up some colleges?
What is your time zone there?
What time zone are you in?
So I was able to match with school ready, and...
So I would like to thank you for your time,
and the school enrollment counselors will contact you in the near future.

executive.text: Tóm tắt dựa trên transcript: My name is James again, and I'm calling on behalf of education experts from the Quality Monitor line. And, well, I see that you recently filled a form on the Internet expressing an interest in earning a degree, sir. Is this correct?
